📜Plot:

Naoki Hanna is a former Olympic swimmer who has won several National Championships Swimming between 2000-2008

Naoki Hanna started her career with Olympic Swimming starting in “Cucumber” High School, which quickly causes her to reach a national level. Naoki Hanna’s upbringing was found in her fluid form while swimming, which has been praised by many critics. Hanna has competed in 8 National cups, where she earned a few national titles.

Naoki Hanna, upon reaching the age of 30, gave up olympic swimming and landed herself a safe steady-paying job at “Watt” College.

Naoki Hanna entered the spot as the main coach into team Hawkings in 2013, when the club grew popularity, leading the team 3 preferectural.
